parsed.availability_comment: CSK CEO confirmation establishes season availability. Prior Dhoni comments and ongoing keeper depth argue for a conservative match count.
parsed.availability_note: Available for IPL 2026; still not projecting all 14 because age/workload and role management remain plausible.
parsed.followup_reason: Need actual CSK XI/keeper usage confirmation once the season starts, because Dhoni is confirmed in squad but Samson materially clouds whether Dhoni starts every match.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Selection pressure is from other wicketkeeper-batters, not overseas slots.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap does not affect selection.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Confirmed available for IPL 2026, but Sanju Samson's arrival creates real wicketkeeper/role-share uncertainty.

You are doing a focused IPL 2026 player availability and lineup audit.

You are refining one player's non-stats fields after an initial team-level pass.
Use web search. Prefer official IPL / franchise / BCCI sources, then reputable cricket reporting.

Rules:
- Return JSON only.
- Keep the same schema as the team-level player object.
- Resolve ambiguity where possible using recent evidence.
- Keep comments short and audit-friendly.
- If evidence remains conflicting, say so explicitly and keep needs_player_followup=true.
- Every source URL array must contain at least one URL.

Refine this single-player non-stats assessment and return the structured JSON.
